home_page.page_description: iPlayground document request entry for looking up available documents for currently open events.
home_page.hero_lead: Choose an event that is currently open for requests to look up available documents.
home_page.form_subtitle: Choose the event and document type for your request.
home_page.lookup_not_found_message: No matching document was found. Please check your information and try again.
home_page.lookup_not_available_yet_message: Completion certificates are not available for download yet. Please try again after the opening time.
home_page.lookup_blocked_message: Too many failed lookups. Lookup is paused for 24 hours.
home_page.lookup_unavailable_message: Document lookup is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
home_page.copyright_notice: All website content and related materials are owned by Taipei Elite Software Developer Association (77212283). Unauthorized reproduction, redistribution, or commercial use is prohibited.
home_page.preview_feedback_template: Lookup details: Event: {eventName}; document type: {documentType}; email: {email}.

verify_page.title: iPlayground Certificate Verification
verify_page.status_value: Verification data is not connected yet
